title: The Day I Thought — This Is It!!
description: On the way back from Illickal Kallu. Fun and scary story — while trying to take this picture, I had my riding gloves removed and hand on the phone. But due to the steepness of the road, my bike (ignition off, key in off position) jumped gear and automatically started rolling down the hill with me on it — without a free hand to stop it. In panic, I immediately freed my left hand from the gloves I was holding, but the left hand handles the clutch — so no use. After rolling down for a few meters, I was finally able to free my right hand and pull the brakes. This is one of the days I thought... This is it!!
